intro.headline: Yassine EL HANAFI
intro.description: I build enterprise and financial web applications with Java, Spring Boot, Angular, PostgreSQL, RabbitMQ, and REST APIs. Currently at Nexpublica.
intro.availability: Based in Morocco. Open to international opportunities.
intro.trust2: Backend services with Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, RabbitMQ, OpenFeign
intro.trust3: Angular frontends integrated with REST APIs

about.heading: About me
about.description: Software Engineer at Nexpublica, working on financial management platforms for public-sector clients. I develop backend services with Java and Spring Boot, integrate Angular frontends with REST APIs, and contribute to debugging, validation, and documentation in Agile teams. Previous experience at Orange Business and Cegedim.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.getInTouch: Open to Backend Java, Full Stack Java/Angular, and Software Engineer roles internationally.
contact.description: Download my CV, email me, or connect on LinkedIn.

cliffford.summary: Gesture-controlled chatbot with OpenCV, CNN/LSTM models, and Firebase authentication.
cliffford.impact: Accessible interaction prototype for gesture-based chat.

pokerPlanning.summary: Real-time agile estimation tool with Spring Boot WebSockets and an Angular client.
pokerPlanning.impact: Live sprint estimation for distributed Agile teams.

tawajooh.title: Tawajooh
tawajooh.summary: Student application portal with form workflows, document tracking, and status dashboards.
tawajooh.impact: Digitized orientation requests for a provincial education authority.

hospitalManagement.title: Hospital Management
hospitalManagement.summary: JavaFX desktop app for clinic scheduling and patient records with MongoDB and Redis.
hospitalManagement.impact: One tool for clinic scheduling and patient records.

blogger.title: Blogger
blogger.summary: Blogging platform with Express.js, Prisma ORM, and role-based access control.

ensetCandidature.role: Tech lead, Scrum Master, and developer on a team of 5.

astreintEase.summary: On-call management system with Spring Cloud microservices and approval workflows.
astreintEase.role: Tech lead and developer. Orange Business internship.

orangeStaffing.title: Orange Staffing
orangeStaffing.summary: Internal recruitment platform with Spring Boot and Angular.
orangeStaffing.role: Tech lead and developer on a team of 3. Orange Business internship.

experience.heading: Work experience
experience.intro: Financial platforms, telecom systems, and HR applications delivered with Java and Spring Boot.

nexpublica.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Developed and maintained features for a financial management platform used by public-sector organizations.
Implemented backend business workflows using Java, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, RabbitMQ, and OpenFeign.
Integrated Angular interfaces with REST APIs and contributed to debugging, validation, and technical documentation.
Worked in Agile/SCRUM delivery with GitLab.

orange1.title: Full Stack Engineer Intern
bullets: Built an on-call request management application with Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, and Angular.
Covered request creation, validation workflows, and status tracking across microservices.
Delivered REST APIs and Angular interfaces for operational teams.

orange2.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Built an internal recruitment application for candidate tracking and hiring workflow follow-up.
Developed Spring Boot REST APIs and Angular screens used by Orange Business HR teams.

cegedim.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Developed a Poker Planning application for Agile estimation sessions with Spring Boot and Angular.
Implemented real-time updates with WebSockets/STOMP for synchronized team planning.
